about.title: About Hemp Ramps
about.storyText: Hemp Ramps is at the intersection of material science and high-performance design. We believe that gaming and sports gear shouldn't cost the Earth. That is why we engineer all of our products using organic hemp fibers, recycled bio-polymers, and advanced non-toxic epoxies.
about.missionText: Our mission is to replace carbon-heavy plastics in action sports and tabletop gaming with lightweight, ultra-durable bio-composites that perform better and last longer.
about.valueCraft: Ecological Design — Every product is designed from the ground up to minimize carbon footprint and utilize renewable organic resources.
about.valueCreativity: Precision Customization — Real-time 3D configurator lets you design your gear exactly how you want it, built to order.
about.valueCommunity: Community Built — We design our products hand-in-hand with athletes, tabletop players, and hobbyists worldwide.
about.visitAddress: Visit our research facility and testing lab in Curitiba, Brazil.
about.visitHours: Open for public tours and custom fittings Monday to Friday.

configurator.foldableDesc: Collapses side ramps for easy transport
